fieldValues.value: We will leave the building in no worse condition than we found it. Installation work must be carried out carefully: minimum drilled holes, no continuous re-drilling into the same plaster, and all fixings made good when removed. The member with Building Authority (R-001) has final say on what is and is not acceptable. This article cannot be weakened or removed without the explicit agreement of the Party Utility.

Our right to use this space depends on the trust of the Party Utility and the building community. Demonstrating care of the building is not optional — it is the basis on which the experiment is allowed to continue.
Unanimous agreement of all current members AND agreement of the Party Utility.
Protected — requires Party Utility agreement to amend
